features: Aquafresh Milk Teeth 0-2 Years Toothpaste Bundle with Extra Soft Toothbrush 0-3 Years
description: Product Description Aquafresh Toothpaste 100ml Active White Ingredients Aqua, Hydrated Silica, Sorbitol, Glycerin, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Aroma, Xanthan Gum, PEG-6, Sodium Fluoride, Alumina, Sodium Saccharin, Carrageenan, Limonene, CI 73360, CI 74160, CI 74260. Directions Apply a pea-sized amount of toothpaste to a soft toothbrush and brush teeth for two minutes, covering all surfaces. Safety Warning Warning: May pose a choking hazard for young children if swallowed. Use only for cleaning teeth and keep out of reach of children. Manufacturer Contact Information Haleon, Building 5, First Floor the Heights Weybridge Surrey KT13 0NY See more
